import ast, re

with open\('scraper_web_v3.py', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find and properly parse the Python string \(with escape processing\)
match = re.search\(r"HTML_TEMPLATE = \('''.*?'''\)", content, re.DOTALL\)
template = ast.literal_eval\(match.group\(1\)\)

# Extract and check the script
script_start = template.index\('<script>'\) + len\('<script>'\)
script_end = template.index\('</script>'\)
script = template[script_start:script_end]

# Show the selectWifi line
for i, line in enumerate\(script.split\('\\n'\), 1\):
    if 'selectWifi' in line:
        print\(f"JS Line {i}: {repr\(line.strip\(\)\)}"\)

with open\('/tmp/rendered_check2.js', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(script\)
PYEOF
node --check /tmp/rendered_check2.js 2>&1)
